paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 5.93, with a decrease of 5.12% from the prior close and 31.52% over the last 20 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news headlines include discussions of governance questions and the resignation of director Miles Everson.

Recent news articles are focused on the resignation of director Miles Everson and its implications for the company's governance. There are also discussions of the company's stock performance and the views of cofounder Toby Neugebauer. The news sources include Yahoo Finance and Stocktwits.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2031. There has also been a Form 8-K filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there is one Form 4 filing in the feed.
